# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Atta, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public issue.** Instead, email security concerns to the maintainers via the contact information on the [CodeLaude GitHub organization](https://github.com/codelaude).

### What to include

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment
- Suggested fix (if any)

### Response timeline

- **Acknowledgment**: within 48 hours
- **Initial assessment**: within 1 week
- **Fix or mitigation**: depends on severity, typically within 2 weeks for critical issues

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 2.x     | Yes       |
| < 2.0   | No        |

## Scope

This policy covers the Atta framework source code, npm package, and shell scripts. It does not cover generated agent files or user-created content in `.claude_dev/` directories.
